Case Law Cited
Pallav Sheth v. Custodian & Ors. [2001] Supp. 1 SCR 387 : (2001) 
7 SCC 549 – relied on.
In Re: Bineet Kumar Singh [2001] 3 SCR 424 : (2001) 5 SCC 
501; In Re : Vinay Chandra Mishra [1995] 2 SCR 638 : (1995) 2 
SCC 584; Pritam Pal v. High Court of Madhya Pradesh, Jabalpur, 
through Registrar [1992] 1 SCR 864 : (1993) Supp. 1 SCC 529; 
Khushi Ram v. Sheo Vati & Anr. (1953) 1 SCC 726 – referred to.
